pass_condition: all component scripts return 0, all component statuses are PASS, and all critical invariants pass
main_insight: Known projection boundary and resilience behavior can be checked as a reproducible regression harness.
interpretation: PASS means all known projection boundary and resilience experiments still satisfy their expected statuses and critical invariants.
limitations: This is not the full OMNIA engine.
This suite only checks selected known experiments.
It does not discover new failure modes.
It does not prove universal robustness.
It depends on toy scripts and toy metrics.
